title: gogo pipeline index
description: A feature-level index of the current artifacts and their validity, so a chainer can see at a glance what each phase last produced and whether it is contract-valid. Stage A may emit this as an output artifact; the orchestrator consuming it to drive the loop is Stage B. state.md remains the human-facing phase/status file.

slug.description: Feature slug this index belongs to (kebab-case, without the feature- prefix).

updated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the index was last written.

phases.description: Latest state per phase. A phase key is present once that phase has run at least once.

status.description: Last outcome of this phase (mirrors phase-result.status).

valid.description: Whether this phase's latest outputs passed validate-out.

round.description: Latest round number for looping phases (implement / review / test).

open_issues.description: Count of open/new issues in this phase's track (review / test), so the loop knows whether to re-enter implement.

artifacts.description: Repo-relative paths to this phase's current artifacts (e.g. review/issues.json, review-02.md).
